title: OpenClaw Sub Agents and ACPX (OpenClaw Business Automation Setup)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates running OpenClaw, a multi-agent orchestration framework, on a Raspberry Pi to automate business tasks including website management, brand learning, and content pipeline deployment. The video compares OpenClaw with Claude Code for handling complex agentic workflows using GitHub repos as a synchronization layer and markdown-based knowledge bases.
